about_projects: Starfire has a book system for hierarchical knowledge
Books → Chapters → Sections with density tiers (High/Medium/Low/Packed)
Starfire has a causal discovery module
Finds causal edges from temporal patterns in data
Autonomous probing of knowledge gaps between conversations
Knows what it knows, tracks confidence explicitly
Starfire uses Bonsai-8B Q1_0_g128 via Candle
Starfire has a CLI (star) and HTTP API
star chat, star doctor commands; REST API on port 8080
Python CLI + Next.js dashboard for experiments
zach_values: Building things that run locally without GPU dependency
Creating AI that has genuine personality, not just templated responses
Pushing the boundary on 1-bit / extreme quantization
Making AI that can actually act on the world (agents, not just chat)
Privacy-first: data stays local, no cloud dependency
